message:
feat(robot): Register docs command in capabilities and add test infrastructure

Completes the --robot-docs feature with discoverability and testing:

- Update capabilities.go: Register docs command with parameters, examples,
  and description for machine-discoverable API via --robot-capabilities
- Add docs_test.go: Unit tests for GetDocs() covering topic index retrieval,
  quickstart topic content, and schema version validation
- Add tests/integration/rest_integration_test.go: REST API integration test
  framework covering session management, beads operations, agent mail, and
  scanner flows with live tmux sessions
- Extend skip.go: Add skip helpers for bd/br, bv, Agent Mail, and UBS
  dependencies to enable conditional test execution based on tool availability

This enables AI agents to discover the docs command through the capabilities
endpoint and validates the documentation system works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -624,6 +624,20 @@ func buildCommandRegistry() []RobotCommandInfo {
 			Parameters:  []RobotParameter{},
 			Examples:    []string{"ntm --robot-capabilities"},
 		},
+		{
+			Name:        "docs",
+			Flag:        "--robot-docs",
+			Category:    "utility",
+			Description: "Get documentation for a topic in JSON format. Topics: quickstart, commands, examples, exit-codes.",
+			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
+				{Name: "topic", Flag: "--robot-docs", Type: "string", Required: false, Default: "", Description: "Documentation topic. Empty returns topic index."},
+			},
+			Examples: []string{
+				"ntm --robot-docs=\"\"",
+				"ntm --robot-docs=quickstart",
+				"ntm --robot-docs=exit-codes",
+			},
+		},
 		{
 			Name:        "tools",
 			Flag:        "--robot-tools",
